title: stevia stolonifera
intro: Stevia stolonifera, also known as Stevia rebaudiana, is a perennial plant native to South America, particularly in Paraguay and Brazil, which is a member of the sunflower family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to regulate blood sugar levels, reduce hypertension, and exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Stevia stolonifera include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve dental health, and provide relief from symptoms of menopause. Stevia stolonifera is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and extracts, which are available in various forms, including sweeteners, dietary supplements, and topical creams.
